import torch
import soundfile as sf
from speechbrain.pretrained import SpectralMaskEnhancement
import os

# Quick test: load model and enhance a short dummy signal
print('Loading model...')
model = SpectralMaskEnhancement.from_hparams(
    source='speechbrain/metricgan-plus-voicebank',
    savedir='/opt/pretrained_models/metricgan-plus-voicebank'
)
device = 'cuda' if torch.cuda.is_available() else 'cpu'
model.to(device)
model.eval()

# Create a 1-second silent waveform
dummy = torch.zeros(1, 16000).to(device)
lengths = torch.tensor([16000], dtype=torch.float, device=device)

print('Enhancing dummy...')
with torch.no_grad():
    out = model.enhance_batch(dummy, lengths=lengths)
    if isinstance(out, tuple):
        out = out[0]
    print(f'Output shape: {out.shape}')

print('Test PASSED')
